properties.body:
NAVAREA XIX  51/14
BARENTS SEA
SVALBARD, HOPEN, BJOEROYA
1. ICEBERGS REPORTED AT 241600 UTC MAY 14:
   A. IN THE AREA OF HOPEN IT IS OBSERVED SEVERAL ICEBERGS OF CONSIDERABLE 
      SIZE THAT CAN BE DANGEROUS FOR SHIPPING.
      VESSELS IN THE AREA AROUND HOPEN, BJOERNOEYA AND WEST OF SVALBARD 
      SHOULD KEEP EXTRA GOOD LOOKOUT. 
 
NAVAREA XIX  51/14
BARENTS SEA
SVALBARD, HOPEN, BJOEROYA
1. ICEBERGS REPORTED AT 241600 UTC MAY 14:
   A. IN THE AREA OF HOPEN IT IS OBSERVED SEVERAL ICEBERGS OF CONSIDERABLE 
      SIZE THAT CAN BE DANGEROUS FOR SHIPPING.
      VESSELS IN THE AREA AROUND HOPEN, BJØRNØYA AND WEST OF SVALBARD 
      SHOULD KEEP EXTRA GOOD LOOKOUT. 

 PREVIOUS HF WARNINGS ISSUED NAVAREA XIX 112/12
